Check_Item: core-confirmed rules can be interpreted as priority governance signals.
binary-stable confirmed rules can be interpreted as stable categorical governance signals.
replayable rules cannot be interpreted as statistically confirmed.
Allowed_Interpretation: auditable but not statistically confirmed governance cue

Check_Item: exploratory rules cannot be interpreted as confirmed findings.
vehicle geometry, lighting, weather/surface friction, safety assistance, and crash configuration cannot be overclaimed if not core-confirmed.
Allowed_Interpretation: discuss as confirmed only for axes/rules with core-confirmed evidence; otherwise use reporting-only boundary
Forbidden_Interpretation: claim as core-confirmed without matching evidence tier

Check_Item: speed-related mechanisms may be described as strongest confirmed evidence if supported by evidence tiers, but not as the only safety-relevant dimension.
Allowed_Interpretation: strongest confirmed evidence when supported by evidence tier, alongside other governance dimensions

Check_Item: governance diversity tables are reporting-only and cannot modify primary evidence.
Forbidden_Interpretation: rule selection, threshold tuning, or evidence-tier modification

Check_Item: missing-category, sentinel, or semantic-duplicate rules are not physical governance targets.
